title: GeoNews AI v2.3 - News Aggregation Pipeline
description: Real-time AI news curation & summarization system. Processes 12,000+ messages daily with sub-second latency. Automated workflow using n8n scheduleTrigger, webhooks, APIs, and intelligent aggregation.

title: AI Medical Clinic Receptionist (WhatsApp + LLMs + Pinecone)
description: Autonomous WhatsApp receptionist agent with memory persistence and intelligent routing. Handles patient inquiries, appointment scheduling, and medical knowledge retrieval from vector database.

title: Text File to Pinecone RAG Pipeline
description: Enterprise-grade RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) pipeline. Automatically ingests text files, generates embeddings, and stores in Pinecone vector database for intelligent document retrieval.

title: GeoNews Telegram Bot - Live Feed Distribution
description: Real-time news distribution bot for Telegram. Aggregates latest AI and geo-political news, processes through LLM pipeline, and dispatches to subscribers with 99.97% uptime.

title: WhatsApp AI Receptionist Chat System
description: Multi-turn conversational AI receptionist on WhatsApp. Handles customer inquiries, supports natural language understanding, and integrates with CRM for context-aware responses.

title: n8n Workflow Error Monitoring & Telegram Alerts
description: Automated monitoring system for n8n workflows. Detects errors in real-time and sends intelligent alerts to Telegram with error context, stack traces, and recovery suggestions.

title: GeoNews All News Aggregator v3 (NYT Integration)
description: Advanced news aggregation system. Pulls from multiple sources including New York Times API. Uses intelligent filtering, ranking, and geo-location analysis for curated news feeds.

title: n8n Project Hub - Workflow Management
description: Centralized n8n project management interface. Showcases project organization, credential management, and workflow orchestration for enterprise automation.

title: n8n Credentials & Integrations Hub
description: Secure credential management and third-party integrations configuration. Demonstrates secure API key handling, OAuth flows, and multi-service authentication.

title: Telegram GeoNews Chat Intelligence
description: Interactive Telegram chat system with geo-intelligence capabilities. Enables conversational queries about global news, events, and AI developments with real-time responses.
